title: Project-management team membership
description: Per DEC-021, an adopter's team-membership roster gating pm operations. Open mode: file absent or members:[] empty list. Closed mode: ≥1 member. Only listed members may invoke mutating pm scripts; bootstrap is self-add by the first member while open mode applies.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Bumps when this file's shape changes; same-PR-as-surface-change discipline per DEC-017.

members.description: Roster of authorised members. Empty array == open mode (any invoker passes). ≥1 entry == closed mode (only listed members pass).

github_login.description: Canonical identity. Matches the value `gh api user --jq .login` returns for the member.

email.description: Identity surface for matching invocations where `gh` is unavailable; falls back to `git config user.email`.

role.description: Informational at v1 per DEC-021. PM and Implementer roles from DEC-008 are not enforced at the script layer; field is here so the assignment is visible to reviewers.

added_at.description: Date the entry was added (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD).

added_by.description: GitHub login of the existing member who authored the addition, or the literal string `bootstrap` for the first member.
